mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scene (scene_id, chapter_id, scene_number, scene_title, scene_type, content, word_count, characters, location, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{sceneId}, #{chapterId}, #{sceneNumber}, #{sceneTitle}, #{sceneType}, #{content}, #{wordCount}, #{characters}, #{location}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE scene SET chapter_id = #{chapterId}, scene_number = #{sceneNumber}, scene_title = #{sceneTitle}, scene_type = #{sceneType}, content = #{content}, word_count = #{wordCount}, characters = #{characters}, location = #{location}, update_time = NOW() WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, scene_id, chapter_id, scene_number, scene_title, scene_type, content, word_count, characters, location, create_time, update_time FROM scene WHERE scene_id = #{sceneId}

SELECT id, scene_id, chapter_id, scene_number, scene_title, scene_type, content, word_count, characters, location, create_time, update_time FROM scene WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} ORDER BY scene_number ASC

SELECT id, scene_id, chapter_id, scene_number, scene_title, scene_type, content, word_count, characters, location, create_time, update_time FROM scene WHERE chapter_id = #{chapterId} AND scene_number = #{sceneNumber} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
